---
title: 'Command-line interface'
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from ccbr_tools.shell import shell_run

help_text = shell_run("syncweaver --help")
print("```")
print(help_text)
print("```")
```

Each command has its own documentation page with full usage, examples, and
notes:

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| [`init`](./init/index.qmd) | Initialize syncweaver content in local or remote repositories |
| [`add`](./add.qmd) | Add an external repository to the host repository |
| [`update`](./update.qmd) | Update a tracked external repository in the host repository |
| [`remove`](./remove.qmd) | Remove a tracked external repository from the host repository |
| [`patch`](./patch/index.qmd) | Create, mark, and list source patch artifacts |
| [`contribute`](./contribute.qmd) | Contribute a host patch back to the source repository |
| [`deps`](./deps/index.qmd) | Analyze source dependencies for host integration |
| [`templates`](./templates/index.qmd) | List and add bundled workflow templates to a repo |
| [`validate`](./validate.qmd) | Validate a lockfile against the syncweaver JSON schema |
